tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show good kidney and electrolyte function, normal lipid profile, and normal fasting glucose. Hemoglobin A1c is mildly elevated, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. HDL cholesterol is slightly above the reference range, which is not clinically concerning. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of diabetes management or lifestyle modification.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
